title: Extra '=' in FastBill API request body
symptom: When using expressions in the FastBill node, an extra '=' appears before the inserted values in the request body.
not_this_if: Using static values in the request body
root_cause: The issue arises from how expressions are evaluated in the node's body definition. When using the $evaluateExpression function, it can lead to incorrect formatting of the request body, resulting in an extra '=' character being added.
fix_steps: Change the body definition to use the 'send' routing instead of directly embedding expressions.
Define the SERVICE property separately in the send routing.
Adjust the filter properties to send them correctly in the body.
agent_instruction: Modify the FastBill node to use the 'send' routing for defining the request body.
